name: fossflow

en.when_to_use: Use it for fashionable isometric cloud, infrastructure, or network architecture diagrams. It provides a declarative model: icons (with url), items (referencing icon ids), and views (placing items on isometric grid tile{x,y}, with connectors joining anchors). Use editorMode 'EXPLORABLE_READONLY' for read-only display. For a freehand whiteboard use excalidraw; for a flat node graph use xyflow/drawflow -- the isometric look is its sole selling point. It is a heavy component: React, with transitive MUI/paper/gsap (817KB bundle plus several MB of dependencies), and emotion injects styles into document.head, so it is unsuitable for strict shadow isolation.
en.why_valuable: Isometric network/infrastructure diagrams require correct isometric projection, grid placement, and icon stacking. Native AI cannot fake 3D projection geometry in flat SVG and can only draw skewed rectangles by hand; FossFLOW renders a clean, interactive isometric topology from a declarative JSON model.

data_in.note: isoflow uses a declarative Model validated by zod. items reference icons[].id through icon; view.items places an item on the isometric grid with tile{x,y}; connectors join anchors on items in the view. icons[].url must be a loadable image (https or data URI). initialData passed to Isoflow = Model & {fitToView?, view?}.

icons.name: string
icons.url: string -- icon image URL/data URI referenced by items[].icon

colors.value: string -- hex color referenced by an item/connector

spec.note: IsoflowProps has width/height(number|string). Give both the container and height px values; do not use vh or percentage heights. The example uses height:400.

when_to_use: 画云/基础设施/网络架构的流行等距(isometric)风格图时用它:提供一个声明式模型——icons(带 url)+ items(引用 icon id)+ views(把 item 放到等距网格 tile{x,y},connectors 连接 anchors),editorMode 用 'EXPLORABLE_READONLY' 做只读展示。要自由手绘白板用 excalidraw,要平面节点图用 xyflow/drawflow——等距外观是它唯一卖点。重组件:React,链式拉入 MUI/paper/gsap(bundle 817KB + 依赖数 MB),且 emotion 把样式注入 document.head,不适合严格 shadow 隔离。
why_valuable: 等距网络/基础设施架构图需要正确的等距投影、网格摆位与图标叠放,原生 AI 在平面 SVG 里无法伪造 3D 投影几何,徒手只能画歪斜矩形;FossFLOW 从声明式 JSON 模型渲染出规整、可交互的等距拓扑图。

data_in.note: isoflow 声明式 Model(zod 校验)。items 通过 icon 字段引用 icons[].id;view.items 用 tile{x,y} 摆到等距网格;connectors 连接 view 内 item 的 anchor。icons[].url 必须是可加载的图片(https 或 data URI)。传给 Isoflow 的 initialData = Model & {fitToView?, view?}。

icons.name: string
icons.url: string —— 图标图片 URL/data URI,被 items[].icon 引用

colors.value: string —— hex 颜色,被 item/connector 引用

spec.note: IsoflowProps 有 width/height(number|string)。容器与 height 都给 px 数值,禁用 vh/百分比高;示例用 height:400。

example._why: isoflow Model 三段联动(icons→items→views.tile)最易漏,minimal 钉死引用链。icons[].url 需替换成真实图片。

uplink: display 默认不上行;节点/连接的选择或编辑若需外传,由消费 AI 接 onModelUpdated(Model)=>void 回调并按载体处理。

carriers.widget: conditional:emotion/MUI 注入 document.head + 菜单 portal 到 document.body,破坏 shadow 隔离;shadow 化需 emotion CacheProvider 绑定 shadowRoot(未实测)
carriers.codex: supported:light DOM + ESM 自解析 react/mui;bundle 重(数 MB)

isolation.evidence: +esm default export = Isoflow (dist/index.d.ts: `export { default } from './Isoflow'`; Isoflow(props: IsoflowProps)=>JSX). IsoflowProps (dist/types/isoflowProps.d.ts): initialData?:Model&{fitToView?,view?}, editorMode?, width?, height?, onModelUpdated?. Model (dist/schemas/model.d.ts, zod): {title(req string), items:[{id,name,icon?,description?}], views:[{id,name,items:[{id,tile:{x,y},labelHeight?}], connectors?:[{id,anchors:[{id,ref:{item?/anchor?/tile?}}]}]}], colors:[{id,value}], icons:[{id,name,url,collection?}]} — schema pins these exactly. editorMode enum (dist/types/common.d.ts): NON_INTERACTIVE|EXPLORABLE_READONLY|EDITABLE. +esm (816947 bytes) chains react@19.1.0, react-dom@19.1.0, @mui/material@5.17.1, @emotion/react@11.14.0, @mui/icons-material, paper, gsap. globalStyleInjection=yes: emotion/MUI inject CSS into document.head (grep +esm: document.head x2, insertRule x1, styleSheet x2, createElement("style") x4) — violates zero-head-injection, and head CSS does not cross a widget shadow boundary, so MUI content in shadow is unstyled without an emotion cache bound to shadowRoot. globalDomMutation=yes: MUI portals menus/dialogs/context-menu to document.body (document.body x15). globalEvents=yes: window/document keydown x8, resize x3, mousemove x2, pointermove x1. shadowCompatible=conditional: light-DOM (artifact/codex) renders fine; widget/shadow needs an emotion CacheProvider targeting the shadow root and menus still escape to body.
